slogan.text: Every civilized person in this world has two homelands: their own and Syria

disarmament.title: Disarmament
disarmament.description: Civilians in possession of a weapon will be able to voluntarily report it in order to formally hand it over to the new military establishment.

security_personnel_verification.title: Security Personnel Verification
security_personnel_verification.description: Each member of the public security forces will receive an ID with a QR code to prove his identity and powers when needed.

census.title: National census
census.description: A national census driven by the Syrian themselves, enabling self-registration and inclusive data collection.

polls.title: Polls
polls.description: A platform for conducting polls and surveys to gauge public opinion on various issues.

hero.title: Let us be the change we want to see
hero.description: We invite you to explore our initiatives and join us in making a difference if they resonate with you.

about.title: About me
about.description: I’m Feras, a Syrian citizen with hope for a brighter future for the new Syria. I’ve been a software engineer since 2010. Despite having a full-time job, pursuing an MSc in Data Science, and having other commitments, I dedicate my spare moments to coding for the Syrian community 💚. If you believe my work is valuable and impactful, your support would allow me to invest more time in creating and enhancing features.
about.esyrians: I have got the domain e-syrians.com for another idea which is different than what I have listed recently. Maybe I will work on it soon.

info_modal.title: How to use the map
info_modal.content1: The map shows delivery points where government representatives are accepting weapons from citizens.
info_modal.content2: Clicking on a marker will display the point information in the bottom-left corner of the map.
info_modal.content3: If you have any weapon(s), please click the action button at the bottom center and begin entering your information.

national_id.title: National ID
national_id.explanation: For your privacy we encrypt your national id, please type it carefully.

notes.title: Additional notes
notes.description: Please add any further details here

report.weapons_list_description: Please select all types you have

census.title: Syrian National Census
census.description: This initiative enables Syrians to register their data themselves. The goal is to create a safe, fast and efficient way to save ourselves and our country a lot of time and money, and to reach our citizens in areas outside government control.

peronalData.title: Personal data
peronalData.description: Here, you can enter your basic information, which will be used for verification and statistics. Please ensure accuracy, as updating this information will require you to go through the verification process again.

accountInfo.title: Account info
accountInfo.description: Use this section to create your login credentials, which you will need to access the platform later.

locationData.title: Current location
locationData.description: Wherever you are, please fill your location data. You cannot update this data more than once in a month

censusData.title: National census data
censusData.description: This platform is not affiliated with or supported by the Syrian government at this time. Therefore, all fields related to personal civilian data are optional. However, if you choose to provide them, rest assured that your information will be stored securely and handled with the utmost confidentiality.

password.label: Password
password.description: Minimum 6 characters, including at least one letter and one digit.

national_id.label: National ID
national_id.description: Your national id will be encrypted and no one will be able to see it

hometown.label: Hometown
hometown.description: Choose your city of origin in Syria

religious_affiliation.label: Religious affiliation
religious_affiliation.description: Will not be visible on your profile

record_id.label: Record ID
record_id.description: Will not be visible on your profile

country.label: Country
country.description: Please select the country you currently live in.

city.label: City
city.description: In which city do you live?

shelter.label: Check this if you live in a shelter

easy_access_to_healthcare_services.label: I can easily access health services

more_info.label: Additional information
more_info.placeholder: Please feel free to add any other info.

form.title: Registration Form
form.description: Only fields marked with a red asterisk (*) are required. However, all the information you provide will be securely stored.
form.error: We could not handle your request. Please try later

profile.copy: Now, it is time to share your profile with the network to get verified

form.alreadySignedInDescription: You can now access the platform's features. If you are using a shared device, remember to sign out before you leave.

first.description: This list includes the first {count} members who registered in the system without verification from others. Since no previous users existed to verify them, their participation is made public for transparency. We assure you that they are real people—you can visit their profiles and check their social media links for verification.
first.title: First Registrants

fraudsters.title: Fraudulent Accounts
fraudsters.description: This page lists accounts that have been identified as fraudulent based on technical evidence. To maintain trust and accuracy in the system, any account proven to be fake will be suspended along with its verifiers. Our commitment is to ensure a reliable and transparent registration process for everyone.

dailyRegistrations.title: Daily user updates
dailyRegistrations.description: Number of accounts have been created/verified

ethnicity.title: Users by ethnicity
ethnicity.description: Splitted based on the verification status

country.SH: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
country.GS: South Georgia and South Sandwich Islands

forgotPassword.title: Get a password reset link
forgotPassword.description: Please enter your email address below. if it is correct, you will receive a instructions email
forgotPassword.success: Done! If the email you entered is in our database, you will receive instructions soon

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Please type your new password in the fields below

my_polls.title: My Polls
my_polls.description: Here you can view the polls you have created

emptyContent.title: You have not added any poll yet

my_votes.title: My Votes
my_votes.description: Here you can view the polls you have voted on

my_reactions.title: My Reactions
my_reactions.description: Here you can view the polls you have reacted to

create.title: Create a new poll
create.description: When creating a poll, please use clear and respectful language. Be specific and make sure your question is well-structured, as edits won’t be possible after submission.
create.accountUnverifiedAlert: Your account is not verified yet! Kindly share your profile link with the community to get enough verifications

start_date.label: Start date
start_date.description: On which date the poll will be published

duration.label: Duration (days)
duration.placeholder: For how many day(s) the audience will be able to vote
duration.error: Please use latin digits to specify days

max_selections.label: Maximum selections
max_selections.description: The maximum number of options a user can select when voting.
max_selections.error: Please use a digit between 1 and 10

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: A blank value indicates that all genders are eligible to vote.

hometown.label: Province
hometown.description: A blank value indicates that users from all provinces are eligible to vote.

ethnicity.label: Ethnicity
ethnicity.description: A blank value indicates that all ethnicities are eligible to vote.

country.label: Country
country.description: A blank value indicates that users in all countries are eligible to vote.

religious_affiliation.label: Religious affiliation
religious_affiliation.description: A blank value indicates that users from all religious affiliations are eligible to vote.

verifiers-table.title: People who have verified my data
verifiers-table.noVerifiers: You have received 0 verifications. You can share your profile URL with your network

security.title: Security settings
security.description: Here, you'll find options to enhance the security of your data. Currently, you can update your account password, with more advanced tools coming soon.

email.title: Update your email address
email.description: Please type your new e-mail address carefully, when you update your e-mail, you will have to log in again

error.tryAgain: Failed to load profile data, please try again later!

basicData.title: My profile
basicData.description: You are allowed to update your data for one time. Please note that updating this information will cause you to lose all the verifications you have received.

profile.confirmation: I understand that updating my basic information will cause me to lose all the verifications I have received.

avatar.title: My avatar
avatar.instructions: Please select a personal image that is under 500KB in size and no larger than 800x800 pixels.

national_id.label: National ID
national_id.description: The national id will be encrypted

update.success: Your civilian data were updated successfully

national_id.label: National ID
national_id.description: The national id will be encrypted

country.label: Country
country.description: Changing your country impacts poll audience targeting and is therefore restricted to a few times per year.

shelter.label: Check this if you live in a shelter

easy_access_to_healthcare_services.label: I can easily access health services

server_errors.basic_info_updates_limit_reached: You have reached the limit of basic info updates. Please reach out to support for further assistance.
server_errors.unknown_error: Something happened on our side, please try again later
server_errors.unauthorized_action: You are not allowed to perform this action
server_errors.country_updates_limit_reached: You have reached the limit of address updates. Please reach out to support for further assistance.
server_errors.you_are_not_verified: You cannot perform this action since your account is not verified
server_errors.you_do_not_have_enough_verifications: You did not receive enough verifications to perform this action
server_errors.you_have_reached_the_maximum_verificatio: You have reached the maximum verifications you can make
server_errors.you_cannot_verify_yourself: You cannot verify your own account
server_errors.circular_verification_not_allowed: Circular verification! You cannot verify an account that verified you
server_errors.you_have_already_verified_this_user: You have already verified this user
server_errors.you_have_already_voted: You have already voted on this poll
server_errors.user_is_not_in_poll_audience: You are not in the poll audience
server_errors.user_has_reached_the_max_selections: You have exceeded the maximum allowed options
server_errors.current_password_incorrect: Your entered password is not correct
server_errors.failed_to_send_password_reset_email: Failed to send password reset link

publicVerify.title: Verify user information
publicVerify.loginToVerify: Guests cannot perform this action! It is limited to users that are already verified
publicVerify.cannotVerifyOwnProfile: Oops! You cannot verify your own profile

rules.content1: Ensure that this profile belongs to someone you personally know.
rules.content2: Pay close attention to every detail provided by the person.
rules.content3: Our platform is built on trust. Any fraudulent accounts will be listed on the Fraudsters page along with the verifiers who approved them.

verificationCancelationReasons.user_updated_basic_info: User has updated his basic data

polls.title: Polls
polls.postedBy: Posted by {name} on {created_at} to be answered between {start_date} and {end_date}
polls.maxSelections: For this poll, you can choose {max, plural,  =1 {one option only} =2 {two options only} other {up to # options}}
polls.cannotVote: Sorry, you cannot submit your vote for the following reason(s):
polls.alreadyReacted: You have already reacted to this poll
polls.description: Verified users can share polls. By default, polls are sorted in descending order based on the difference between upvotes and downvotes and are categorized by month.

filter.description: Display polls by year and month
filter.title: Filter Polls

noPolls.title: No Polls
noPolls.description: No polls were created within the selected time frame

cannot_vote_reasons.age: Your age is not within the age range of this poll audience
cannot_vote_reasons.country: the country you live in is not in the countries list of this poll audience
cannot_vote_reasons.ethnicity: the ethnicity you belong to in is not in the list of this poll audience
cannot_vote_reasons.gender: Your gender in is not in the list of this poll audience
cannot_vote_reasons.hometown: The hometown you belong to in is not in the list of this poll audience
cannot_vote_reasons.religious_affiliation: The sect you belong to in is not in the list of this poll audience
cannot_vote_reasons.not_in_audience: You are not in the targeted audience of this poll
cannot_vote_reasons.has_voted: You have already voted on this poll
cannot_vote_reasons.poll_expired: Poll is expired and no longer accepting new votes

emailVerification.title: Email Verification
emailVerification.error: We could not verify your email address 😔, please log in and request another link from your account
emailVerification.success: We have verified your email address. Thank you! 🙂
